source: A starbase focused on ship construction.\n
text: A starbase focused on ship construction.__PROT_0000__

source: This specially-designed facility makes use of advanced technology to maintain atmospheric pressures within the Shipyards, allowing workers to more easily build, maintain, upgrade, and repair warships.\n
text: This specially-designed facility makes use of advanced technology to maintain atmospheric pressures within the Shipyards, allowing workers to more easily build, maintain, upgrade, and repair warships.__PROT_0000__

source: A significantly larger version of the standard fleet anchorage for our rapidly expanding navy.\n

source: The starbase sensor station uses advanced sensor arrays to extend our intelligence gathering capabilities across several star systems, giving us advanced warning of any possible threats near our borders.\n

source: This set of solar panels provides energy to the starbase, helping to counteract the costs of running the installation and generating surplus energy.\n
